metadata.description: bureau — turn AI sessions into a maintained, human-reviewed knowledge base, by xiaolai

plugins.name: bureau
plugins.description: Turn AI sessions into a maintained, human-reviewed knowledge base: capture sessions to append-only logbooks, compile into consistency-checked cabinet pages gated by trust tiers (proposed → verified → canonical), query the canon tier-aware, and render with the bundled gazette dashboard. Karpathy LLM-wiki pattern + session provenance + a human review gate. Self-contained — no separate install.
